title: [MTR4] S700 with Pantograph
description: This pack adds a version of the Siemens S700 with a pantograph to Minecraft Transit Railway
body:
This resource pack adds a version of the Sound Transit Siemens S700 light rail vehicle (LRV) with a pantograph to Minecraft Transit Railway 4.x.x.

To use it, add "Sound Transit Siemens S700 (Middle, With Pantograph)" or "Sound Transit Siemens S700 (Middle, Low Floor, With Pantograph)" to your train consist, and simply keep the front and back sections that are included with the base mod.
